# QC-06: Functional & Non-Functional Testing

**Track:** Quality Controls (`QC`) · **Priority:** SHOULD (recommended) · **Status:** draft

Execute the full test suite covering: functional tests mapped to every Stage 1 acceptance criterion, regression tests, negative and boundary tests, performance tests, load tests, stress tests, accessibility tests, and resilience tests. All tests must be traced to their originating acceptance criteria.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 4 | Testing & Documentation | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Agent executes, human reviews |
| **Agent does** | Execute full test suite; generate pass/fail report mapped to acceptance criteria. |
| **Human does** | Review test results; investigate failures; determine if failures block release or require fix. |

## Inputs

| Artifact | Source Control | Description |
|----------|---------------|-------------|
| Validated feature specification | QC-01 | Stage 1 acceptance criteria used as the test basis. |
| Approved pull request | QC-04 | Merged code that is the subject of testing. |


## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| Test results report | evidence | Full test results mapped to acceptance criteria with pass/fail status per criterion. | 7 years (DORA) |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_release |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | block |
| **Escalate to** | QA Lead |

Failing tests block Stage 4 exit. Work is returned to Stage 3 for remediation.

## Dependencies

- `QC-04`


## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 8(4) | Thorough testing of ICT systems before deployment to production |
| EU AI Act | Art. 15(1) | AI systems must be tested for appropriate levels of accuracy and reliability |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** Quality Assurance · **Owner role:** QA Lead
